content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.91%, Pharma (+2.71%) and Realty (+2.49%) leading, VIX cooling -6.3%. Power, metals, autos all firm. Book is 60% deployed and showing modest +0.31% session gain. Focus this tick is on managing existing positions — trailing SLs on winners, holding losers near support — rather than adding new exposure with three working BUY orders already in the queue.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.80,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+7.2% unrealized gain. Current SL 1033.90 is already above entry — locking gains. Tightening marginally to 1035 (just above today's intraday low of 1040 cushion is too tight; staying at 1035 below the 1040 intraday low). Thesis intact: blockbuster Q4, GNPA<1%, MACD bullish. Target 1110 unchanged. R:R favorable; let momentum run."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.4%, near breakeven SL already. Heatwave demand thesis intact (256 GW peak). No tightening today since SL=406 is essentially breakeven; emitting HOLD via position_actions. Actually skipping MODIFY to avoid no-op."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.7%, but PSU bank thesis intact (record Q4, GNPA 1.45%, sector strong). Stock recovered to 79.30 from intraday low of 78.51, holding above support 78.36. SL at 76.50 (~3.5% away) gives room. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge position, -0.7%. Gold consolidating; central-bank accumulation and Fed cuts ahead remain supportive. SL 119 (~4.3% away) appropriate. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.4% with Q4 results imminent on Apr 30 (3 days). Binary event risk — but SL at 2295 (~1.8% below CMP) caps downside, and Nestle's blockbuster sets supportive sector tone. Holding into results with defined risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1720.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 1715 to 1720 (just below intraday support 1722). Stock made huge intraday move on Organon deal (1621→1766 high), now consolidating at 1737. Tightening modestly to reduce risk on this volatile name while preserving room above the 1722 intraday floor. Target 1830 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.8%, SL already at 1418 (above entry 1412.94 — already at breakeven+). Blockbuster Q4 results, brokerage upgrades to 1500/1504. Holding with trailed SL intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.4%. Stock made 52w high 1824 today, pulled back to 1784. Up 39% in April — extended. SL 1760 (1.4% below CMP) close. Hold; if breaks 1760, exit cleanly."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.3%. SL 318 (below entry 320.50). Sector tailwind from record peak demand. Holding; will trail higher if move extends."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "PSU bank thesis intact, stock holding support 78.36. SL 76.50 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock further gains; SL above entry, just below intraday floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge; SL 119 wide enough."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed above entry (1418 vs 1412.94). No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Holding through Apr 30 results with defined SL 2295."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 406 already at breakeven+; let it run on heatwave demand thesis."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Stock extended; existing SL 1760 close enough — will exit cleanly if broken."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1720.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten modestly given large intraday volatility on Organon news; preserve room above intraday support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position barely positive; SL 318 reasonable. Will trail higher if move accelerates."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TORNTPOWER, JSWENERGY, TATAPOWER all extended; TATAPOWER BUY at 443 still working. Power cluster exposure already meaningful (NTPC + POWERGRID + TORNTPOWER held + TATAPOWER pending) — will not add more power names. SUNPHARMA already held; PHARMABEES pending order at 23.65 covers ETF pharma exposure. AXISBANK falling-knife — wait for stabilization. M&MFIN, ANANTRAJ, INDUSINDBK gapped up too far; chasing inappropriate. UTIAMC bearish on Q4 loss — pass. VBL valuation stretched post-30% April rally and sell-the-news today — pass.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 60% deployed with 9 positions and 3 working BUY orders — adequate diversification across PSU bank, HFC, gold, FMCG (2), pharma, power (3 incl. NTPC/POWERGRID/TORNTPOWER), banking. NOT adding new entries this tick per deployment hysteresis rule. Power cluster (NTPC+POWERGRID+TORNTPOWER+TATAPOWER pending) approaching cluster cap — no further power adds. Three working OPEN orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) will fill or expire on their own; not duplicating. Focus stays on position management. HUL Q4 on Apr 30 is the only binary event in current book — risk capped by SL. Daily P&L positive, well within loss limit."
}
